headline: NVR (NVR) Authorizes Buybacks And Joins Russell Growth Indices, Is It Fully Priced?
summary: NVR (NVR) has come into focus after authorizing a large share repurchase program and joining multiple Russell growth indices, a combination that puts capital returns and index driven demand firmly on investors’ radar. See our latest analysis for NVR. Against that backdrop, NVR’s share price has moved to $6,693.66, with a 1 month share price return of 8.27% and a year to date share price return that is down 8.04%. The 5 year total shareholder return of 34.91% contrasts with a 1 year total...
